code:
import io
import string

fn is_space(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut evens = ""
mut odds = ""
mut token = ""
mut i = 0

while i <= n
  mut sep = true
  if i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_space(b)
        sep = true
      else
        sep = false
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      sep = true
    end
  end

  if sep
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        if v % 2 == 0
          if string.is_empty(evens)
            evens = "#{v}"
          else
            evens = "#{evens} #{v}"
          end
        else
          if string.is_empty(odds)
            odds = "#{v}"
          else
            odds = "#{odds} #{v}"
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      token = ""
    end
  end

  i = i + 1
end

print("evens=#{evens}")
print("odds=#{odds}")
